title: WATCH:  Attack on Iran: How we got here
fullText: Attack on Iran: How we got hereABC News chief global affairs correspondent Martha Raddatz reports on Iran's recent history and what life was like under the Ayatollah's regime.March 2, 2026
summary: ABC News chief global affairs correspondent Martha Raddatz reports on Iran's recent history and what life was like under the Ayatollah's regime.
